400.description: Validation error or variant not found

put.description: Update the exact quantity of a specific cart item

400.description: Validation error or item not found

delete.description: Delete a specific item from the user's cart

400.description: Invalid ID or item not found

get.description: Retrieve a list of all product categories

post.description: Authenticate user credentials and return access and refresh tokens

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's order history

get.description: Retrieve a specific order and its associated items
Retrieve a paginated list of products with optional filtering by category and search keyword
Retrieve detailed product information including variants, store, and category
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information excluding password and refresh token
Retrieve all saved shipping addresses for the authenticated user

Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token
Create a new customer account with name, email, password, and phone
Receive asynchronous payment status notification from Midtrans and update order payment status
